name: methanol_pka_acidity
prompt: Run the pka-acidity task for methanol using the PM7 (MOPAC) method in implicit water (absolute mode). Pass the protonated form with --ha and the deprotonated form with --a-minus. Report the aqueous pKa as the headline value, and state the method, mode, and charges used. Note PM7 absolute pKa is screening-grade. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
